title: ThreatenIntel
description: Threatens Intel GPUs to work properly with PMWeather 0.15 and above
body:
# Discontinuation

This mod has been discontinued, as the permanent blanket bug has been resolved as of 0.16a.

# **📋 Overview**

ThreatenIntel is an Addon For **Protomanly's Weather Mod**. It addresses a specific rendering issue on **Intel GPUs and integrated graphics (iGPUs**) when the Overcast Present option is enabled.

# **⚙️ What It Fixes**

- Resolves the Permanent blanket glitch caused by the "Overcast Present" option on Intel GPUs.
  
- Full compatibility for players using Intel GPUs.

# **🖼️ Screenshots**

- Tested on an Intel Core I5 1235U With Integrated UHD Graphics

![Overcast on Default 0.85](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c8a822af17747f85548a36eb20e173ed50d68a1.png)

# **Requirements** 

- PMWeather 0.15 or Above
- An Intel GPU or IGPU
